Script.name: icesus.core
Script.script:
-- Icesus Mudlet package — core -- v0.1.0 • https://github.com/Icesus-mud/mudlet-package -- -- One Lua script defines the whole package. Everything lives under the -- global table `icesus`. On (re)load, the previous instance is torn down -- and a fresh one installed, so editing this script and saving in -- Mudlet's IDE replaces the running HUD cleanly. icesus = icesus or {} icesus.version = "0.1.0" -- ============================================================= -- Hot-reload: tear down the previous instance if present. -- ============================================================= if type(icesus.teardown) == "function" then pcall(icesus.teardown) end -- ============================================================= -- Config — tweak in your private session, or PR upstream defaults. -- ============================================================= icesus.config = { borderRight = 320, -- pixels reserved on the right for enemy/channel panels borderBottom = 64, -- pixels reserved on the bottom for vitals gauges channelLines = 500, -- buffer size for the channel miniconsole channelTimes = true, -- prefix channel lines with HH:MM } -- ============================================================= -- Internal state. -- ============================================================= icesus.state = { vitals = { hp = 0, hpmax = 0, sp = 0, spmax = 0, ep = 0, epmax = 0 }, enemies = {}, inCombat = false, } icesus.hud = nil icesus.handlers = {} -- ============================================================= -- Shape buckets — must match adm/daemons/gmcp_d.c:411-427. -- The server quantizes enemy HP to these tiers; the client -- should not pretend to know more. -- ============================================================= icesus.shapeColors = { [100] = "#22c55e", -- excellent [99] = "#4ade80", -- good [90] = "#a3e635", -- slightly hurt [80] = "#d9f99d", -- moderately hurt [70] = "#facc15", -- not good [60] = "#f59e0b", -- severely hurt [50] = "#fb923c", -- bad [40] = "#f97316", -- very bad [30] = "#ef4444", -- extremely bad [20] = "#dc2626", -- gravely wounded [10] = "#b91c1c", -- almost dead [5] = "#7f1d1d", -- dead meat } local function shapeColor(pct) -- Snap arbitrary pct to the nearest defined bucket below it. local last = "#7f1d1d" for _, b in ipairs({100, 99, 90, 80, 70, 60, 50, 40, 30, 20, 10, 5}) do if pct >= b then return icesus.shapeColors[b] end last = icesus.shapeColors[b] end return last end -- ============================================================= -- HUD construction. -- ============================================================= function icesus.setupHUD() if icesus.hud then return end icesus.hud = {} setBorderRight(icesus.config.borderRight) setBorderBottom(icesus.config.borderBottom) -- ----- bottom: vitals gauges ----- icesus.hud.bottom = Geyser.HBox:new({ name = "icesus.bottom", x = 0, y = "-" .. icesus.config.borderBottom, width = "100%", height = icesus.config.borderBottom, }) local function makeGauge(key, label, fill, back) local g = Geyser.Gauge:new({ name = "icesus." .. key }, icesus.hud.bottom) g.front:setStyleSheet(string.format([[ background-color: %s; border: 1px solid #111; border-radius: 3px; ]], fill)) g.back:setStyleSheet(string.format([[ background-color: %s; border: 1px solid #111; border-radius: 3px; ]], back)) g.text:setStyleSheet([[ color: #fff; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 11pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignCenter'; ]]) g:setValue(1, 1, label) return g end icesus.hud.hp = makeGauge("hp", "HP", "#16a34a", "#1a1a1a") icesus.hud.sp = makeGauge("sp", "SP", "#2563eb", "#1a1a1a") icesus.hud.ep = makeGauge("ep", "EP", "#a855f7", "#1a1a1a") -- ----- right column ----- icesus.hud.right = Geyser.VBox:new({ name = "icesus.right", x = "-" .. icesus.config.borderRight, y = 0, width = icesus.config.borderRight, height = "100%-" .. icesus.config.borderBottom, }) -- Enemy panel: a single Label whose HTML is rebuilt on each Status. icesus.hud.enemyBox = Geyser.Container:new({ name = "icesus.enemyBox", height = "40%", }, icesus.hud.right) icesus.hud.enemyBox:setStyleSheet("background-color: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #333;") icesus.hud.enemyLabel = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "icesus.enemyLabel", x = 4, y = 4, width = "100%-8", height = "100%-8", }, icesus.hud.enemyBox) icesus.hud.enemyLabel:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: #1a1a1a; color: #ddd; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 10pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignTop'; ]]) icesus.hud.enemyLabel:echo([[
no targets
]]) -- Channel miniconsole. icesus.hud.channels = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = "icesus.channels", autoWrap = true, fontSize = 10, color = "#0d0d0d", }, icesus.hud.right) icesus.hud.channels:setBufferSize(icesus.config.channelLines, icesus.config.channelLines) icesus.hud.channels:cecho("--- Icesus channels (Comm.Channel) ---\n") end function icesus.teardownHUD() if not icesus.hud then return end for _, w in pairs(icesus.hud) do if w and type(w.hide) == "function" then pcall(function() w:hide() end) end end icesus.hud = nil setBorderSizes(0, 0, 0, 0) end -- ============================================================= -- Render. -- ============================================================= function icesus.refreshGauges() if not icesus.hud then return end local s = icesus.state.vitals local function setG(g, cur, max, label) if not g then return end local m = math.max(max, 1) g:setValue(math.min(cur, m), m, string.format("%s %d / %d", label, cur, max)) end setG(icesus.hud.hp, s.hp, s.hpmax, "HP") setG(icesus.hud.sp, s.sp, s.spmax, "SP") setG(icesus.hud.ep, s.ep, s.epmax, "EP") end function icesus.refreshEnemies() if not icesus.hud or not icesus.hud.enemyLabel then return end local enemies = icesus.state.enemies if #enemies == 0 then icesus.hud.enemyLabel:echo( [[
no targets
]]) return end local rows = { [[]] } for _, e in ipairs(enemies) do local pct = tonumber(e.hp) or 0 local col = shapeColor(pct) local name = (e.name or "?"):gsub("[<>&]", { ["<"]="<", [">"]=">", ["&"]="&" }) local bar = string.rep("\xe2\x96\x88", math.floor(pct / 10)) -- █ blocks, 0..10 table.insert(rows, string.format( [[]] .. [[]] .. [[]] .. [[]], name, col, bar, pct, e.shape or "")) end table.insert(rows, "
%s%s%d%%
%s
") icesus.hud.enemyLabel:echo(table.concat(rows)) end -- ============================================================= -- GMCP handlers. -- ============================================================= function icesus.onVitals() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not v then return end icesus.state.vitals.hp = tonumber(v.hp) or icesus.state.vitals.hp icesus.state.vitals.sp = tonumber(v.sp) or icesus.state.vitals.sp icesus.state.vitals.ep = tonumber(v.ep) or icesus.state.vitals.ep icesus.refreshGauges() end function icesus.onMaxstats() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Maxstats if not v then return end icesus.state.vitals.hpmax = tonumber(v.maxhp) or icesus.state.vitals.hpmax icesus.state.vitals.spmax = tonumber(v.maxsp) or icesus.state.vitals.spmax icesus.state.vitals.epmax = tonumber(v.maxep) or icesus.state.vitals.epmax icesus.refreshGauges() end function icesus.onStatus() local s = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status if not s then return end icesus.state.enemies = {} if type(s.enemies) == "table" and s.enemies[1] then for _, e in ipairs(s.enemies) do table.insert(icesus.state.enemies, { name = e.name or "?", hp = tonumber(e.hp) or 0, shape = e.shape or "", }) end elseif s.enemy and s.enemy ~= "" then table.insert(icesus.state.enemies, { name = s.enemy, hp = tonumber(s.enemypct) or 0, shape = "", }) end icesus.state.inCombat = (s.state == "combat") icesus.refreshEnemies() end function icesus.onEnemyDeath() local d = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.EnemyDeath if not d or not d.name then return end local kept = {} for _, e in ipairs(icesus.state.enemies) do if e.name ~= d.name then table.insert(kept, e) end end icesus.state.enemies = kept icesus.refreshEnemies() end function icesus.onChannel() local c = gmcp.Comm and gmcp.Comm.Channel if not c or not icesus.hud or not icesus.hud.channels then return end local mc = icesus.hud.channels local time = icesus.config.channelTimes and (os.date("%H:%M ")) or "" local chan = c.chan or "?" local who = c.player or "" local msg = c.msg or "" if who ~= "" then mc:cecho(string.format("%s[%s] %s: %s\n", time, chan, who, msg)) else mc:cecho(string.format("%s[%s] %s\n", time, chan, msg)) end end -- ============================================================= -- GMCP subscription. The Char and Comm modules cover everything -- this v0.1 needs: Vitals, Maxstats, Status, EnemyDeath, Channel. -- ============================================================= function icesus.subscribeGMCP() sendGMCP('Core.Supports.Set ["Char 1", "Char.Vitals 1", "Comm 1", "Room 1"]') end -- ============================================================= -- Install / uninstall. -- ============================================================= local function reg(event, fn) table.insert(icesus.handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler(event, fn)) end function icesus.install() icesus.uninstall() -- idempotent icesus.setupHUD() reg("gmcp.Char.Vitals", icesus.onVitals) reg("gmcp.Char.Maxstats", icesus.onMaxstats) reg("gmcp.Char.Status", icesus.onStatus) reg("gmcp.Char.EnemyDeath", icesus.onEnemyDeath) reg("gmcp.Comm.Channel", icesus.onChannel) reg("sysConnectionEvent", icesus.subscribeGMCP) reg("sysExitEvent", icesus.uninstall) if isConnected and isConnected() then icesus.subscribeGMCP() end cecho("\nIcesus package v" .. icesus.version .. " ready. " .. "(GMCP HUD: vitals, enemies, channels)\n") end function icesus.uninstall() if icesus.handlers then for _, h in ipairs(icesus.handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, h) end icesus.handlers = {} end icesus.teardownHUD() end icesus.teardown = icesus.uninstall icesus.install()
